name: gpt-image-canvas
description: Local professional AI canvas powered by tldraw and GPT Image 2.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/shared build && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/web build && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/api build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @gpt-image-canvas/api typecheck
